courses.title: Vedic Astrology Foundation (Parashari Method)
courses.description: Master the foundational pillars of Parashari Astrology. Learn how to interpret Houses (Bhavas), Signs (Rashis), Planets (Grahas), and their aspects (Drishtis). Gain complete operational proficiency in drawing and reading basic natal horoscopes with detailed accuracy.
highlights: Understand the 12 Bhavas and their deep psychological significance
Analyze the strength of 9 Grahas through Shadbala parameters
Map out primary and secondary planetary aspects (Drishtis)
Interpret Navamsha (D-9) divisional charts for marital alignments

modules.title: 1.1 Introduction to the Sidereal Zodiac vs. Tropical Zodiac
1.2 Elements and Attributes of the 12 Houses (Bhavas)
2.1 Benefic vs. Malefic Functional Status of Planets

courses.title: Advanced Kundali Analysis & Dasha Prediction
courses.description: Deep dive into the timing of events using Vimshottari and Yogini Dasha systems. Learn to read planetary transits (Gochara), Ashtakavarga grids, and divisional charts (Vargas like D-10 for career and D-30 for obstacles). Predict core life milestones including career breakthroughs, wealth acquisitions, and spiritual awakenings.
highlights: Deconstruct Vimshottari Mahadasha, Antardasha, and Pratyantardasha cycles
Calculate transit alignments (Gochara) using Shani's Sade Sati impact
Evaluate Ashtakavarga points (Bindus) for precise quantitative strengths
Perform Muhurta computations for wedding dates and corporate inaugurations

courses.title: Sanskrit Grammar & Pronunciation Mastery
courses.description: Learn Sanskrit from scratch following the classical Ashtadhyayi guidelines laid down by Sage Panini. Obtain absolute precision in chanting sacred stotras, Vedas, Upanishads, and original Shlokas. Cover Maheshvara Sutras, sandhi modifications, noun declensions (vibhakti), and verb conjugation rules.
highlights: Chant the 14 Maheshvara Sutras with accurate acoustic alignment
Decode sandhi transition combinations (Svara, Vyanjana, and Visarga)
Decline classical nouns in all 8 Vibhaktis (Declensions)
Deconstruct philosophical verses from Upanishads with word-by-word meaning

modules.title: 1.1 Anatomy of Sound: Varnas & Five Places of Articulation

quizzes.title: Introduction to Parashari Jyotish Principles
quizzes.description: Evaluate your core understanding of Rasis, Bhavas, and planetary aspects.

questions.question: Which of the following houses (Bhavas) is considered a primary 'Dharma Trikona'?
questions.explanation: The Dharma Trikona houses are the 1st (Self), 5th (Intellect/Purvapunya), and 9th (Wisdom/Dharma) houses, establishing cosmic direction.

questions.question: Which planet is exalted (Ucha) in the sign of Aries (Mesha)?
questions.explanation: Surya (the Sun) is exalted at 10 degrees in Aries, signifying highest vitality, leadership potential, and self-realization.

quizzes.title: Sanskrit Grammar & Sacred Sounds Evaluation
quizzes.description: Test your skills on sound articulation, Paninian rules, and sandhi structures.

questions.question: Which sutras describe the phonemes of the Sanskrit language in Panini's grammar?
questions.explanation: The 14 Maheshvara Sutras are the foundational sound syllables revealed to Sage Panini, representing the entire seed-matrix of Sanskrit phonetics.

discussions.title: Vite HMR Connection Errors
discussions.body: Is anyone seeing 'failed to connect to websocket' in developer logs? Is this standard?

replies.body: Yes, this is completely benign and expected because Dev HMR is disabled to avoid visual flickering during live file saves.

tarotReadings.name: Ashif Ansari
tarotReadings.question: Should I accept the senior engineering partnership at StudySync?

aiSummary.summary: Your career reading presents a stellar beacon of hope and cosmic luck. Accepting this senior role is highly supported.
aiSummary.spiritualGuidance: The Star illuminates your soul's true vocation. You are transitioning out of a high-pressure corporate cage into a landscape of creative freedom and community praise.
aiSummary.emotionalInsight: Calm your imposter anxieties. Your heart has fully recovered from past failures; you have the inner starlight to lead.
aiSummary.practicalAdvice: Accept the partnership with total confidence. Pour your unique gifts of master engineering into the database cleanly.
reflectionQuestions: What old corporate blockages are you ready to permanently leave behind?
How can you lead your junior engineers with patient, radiating vision?
growthOpportunities: Asserting active confidence in high-stakes negotiations.
Nurturing dynamic team collaborations over competitive isolation.

tarotReadings.name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
tarotReadings.question: How do I cultivate deeper stillness during early morning meditation?

aiSummary.summary: To gain profound silence, you must transition from over-isolated mental struggles to gentle, compassionate resilience.
aiSummary.spiritualGuidance: The Hermit reversed warns against spiritual paranoia. True silence is not a rigid fortress taming noise; it is space.
aiSummary.emotionalInsight: The Four of Cups highlights a subtle apathy. You might be ignoring subtle quiet blessings by forcing meditation scripts.
aiSummary.practicalAdvice: Practice passive contemplation. Allow thoughts to rise and fall like ocean waves. Sit comfortably for 20 minutes without demands.
reflectionQuestions: Are you forcing silence as a way to escape physical human emotions?
How does gentle self-forgiveness open portals of inner light?
growthOpportunities: Shifting from forced discipline to soft, unconditional self-compassion.
Listening closely to starlight insights situations.

aiSummary.summary: Your Love reading for "meri nyi gf kab banegi?" reveals an authentic alignment of earthy and cosmic energies. Guided by Queen of Pentacles (Upright) in the Universal Guidance position, the oracle signals a vital transition.
aiSummary.spiritualGuidance: Spiritually, the presence of Queen of Pentacles invites you to integrate the qualities of Upright. The cards advise: "Be a warm, generous provider. Nurture your physical body and environment, and manage your resources cleanly." to unlock higher states of inner awareness.
aiSummary.emotionalInsight: On an emotional layer, the challenges shown center around: Over-extending your energy to protect everyone's physical comfort.. Do not let transient anxieties freeze your flow. Connect directly with your inner child's pure wisdom.
aiSummary.practicalAdvice: To apply this reading physically, execute these direct steps: Be a warm, generous provider. Nurture your physical body and environment, and manage your resources cleanly. Establish clear boundaries, clear distractions, and let your plans mature.
reflectionQuestions: How does the core lesson of Queen of Pentacles help you face current limits with complete honor?
In what ways is your focus on "meri nyi gf kab banegi?" a reflection of a deeper desire for control?
growthOpportunities: Embrace the active guidance to: Be a warm, generous provider. Nurture your physical body and environment, and manage your resources cleanly..
Release obsolete material attachments and cultivate dynamic, loving connections instead.
